text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap and I are on our way back from an
outing, when...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Hey, isn't that Oguri Cap?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: It is! I'm a big fan, Oguri! I went to your last race!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, thanks...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text: What's your secret to running so fast?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Umm... Move your legs... as quickly as you can.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text:
That... makes sense. A bit simple, but since you're
the one saying it, I guess it's worth giving it a
shot!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
We'll get out of your way now! Sorry for
bothering you! And thanks for the advice!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: You're welcome. Thanks to you guys too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Oguri's fans go on their way, looking pleased.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Sigh.
choice_data_list: Not used to all the attention, huh?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I've never really given it much thought.
But now that you mention it, maybe.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Back in my hometown, there weren't a lot of other
people around my age.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But the more I race, the more I notice people
approaching me in public.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I should probably get better at interacting with
them.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Do you have any pointers?
choice_data_list:
Sometimes you've just got to jump in the deep
end!

Sometimes you've just got to jump in the deep
end!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Do you have any pointers?
choice_data_list:
Sometimes you've just got to jump in the deep
end!

Sometimes you've just got to jump in the deep
end!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. I'm sure the two of us will be able to
come up with some sort of plan.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'm a few sandwiches short of a picnic, so I need
your help.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Huh? Is that not how you use the phrase?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, what I mean is that tackling something
like this will take time.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
So... I'm counting on you to help me out—till
death do us part!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Setting aside Oguri Cap's unusual choice of
words, we decide to practice handling situations
involving groups of people her age.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
You're right. I have to do something about this.
Throwing myself into the deep end might be hard,
but... if it's sink or swim, then I'll swim!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: So... what are we doing?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Bargain hunting, huh? I see... I'm sure there'll be
lots of people doing the same.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap and I make our way to the shopping
district, but...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: There's nothing left... I guess we were too late.

text_block_list.name: Shopper A
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! You gotta move quickly when it comes
to these sales!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
That makes sense. So it's kind of like a race... I'll
be sure to start strong next time.

text_block_list.name: Shopper B
text_block_list.text: Oh, do you race, miss?

text_block_list.name: Shopper B
text_block_list.text:
Here, take these. You and your trainer should eat
them for energy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We're given two croquettes that were in the sale.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Really? Thank you! I'll give my next race
everything I've got!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Throwing myself in the deep end was a
good idea. I wasn't nervous even with all those
people around me.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
And I even got to eat a croquette. Thanks for the
help!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She may not have been surrounded by people her
age, but this experience still seems to have
helped her.
